Goal: Google SWE
Dream in Progress
identity.bio

Building the future,
one line at a time.

I'm a Computer Science student on a mission to turn ideas into reality through code. Currently pursuing my Diploma in CSE at JIS School of Polytechnic, Ichapur, West Bengal — I spend my days learning, building, and breaking things (on purpose).

I'm deeply fascinated by AI, modern web development, WebGL, and designing systems that actually matter. Whether it's a React app, a 3D particle universe, or an AI automation script — if it's challenging and impactful, I'm in.

My ultimate goal? To join Google as a software engineer and build products that impact millions of people.

🤖 AI & ML 🌐 Web Dev ⚙️ System Design 🔮 WebGL / Three.js 📚 Self-Learning 🏆 Google Arcade 🚀 Open Source
Google  fan since I first used Search. Building towards a seat at the table.
core.values

What I Stand For

🔵

Build for Everyone

Like Google Search — technology should be accessible, useful, and free for all humans on earth.

🔴

Move Fast, Stay Bold

Don't ship mediocre. Ship thoughtful. Take on ambitious problems without fear of failure.

🟡

Always Be Learning

The best engineers are eternal students. From C to Three.js — curiosity never stops.

🟢

Impact at Scale

Small, beautiful code can reach millions. That's what drives me — scale with elegance.
